---
title: "06. 针刺法则与操作约束"
subtitle: "Needling Law and Local Intervention Constraints"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 6
categories: [huangdi-neijing, cultural, omega]
description: "How acupuncture law,刺禁,补泻, and timing frame therapy as lawful local intervention rather than global rewrite of the body."
---

**Chapters:** 素问26-28, 素问50-55, 素问61-64, 灵枢01-03, 灵枢07, 灵枢09, 灵枢67, 灵枢75, 灵枢78  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `fiber structure`, `spectral theory`

{{< include articles/category_06_needling_law_local_intervention_constraints.md >}}

---

[Back to Huangdi Neijing Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
